coin: Discover a wide range of automatic automated payment machines adapted to your needs.
coin2: Small or large businesses, CashBox automated payment machines respond to all types of traffic and situations thanks to their speed and security.
coin3: Independent or connected to your cash register system, you have the choice of how to use it.
coin4: Don't waste any more time or money, our coin changers secure your payments.
control2: Aside from its superb look, CashBox Order offers you a multiple payment service.
control3: Boost your productivity, by reducing waiting time and increasing the average basket of your customers.
savTitle2: Available 7 days a week, including Sundays
sav: A breakdown or technical issue with your payment system is always urgent. At VNE Belgium by CashConcept, we do everything possible to ensure the continuity of your business.
sav2: Support available 7 days a week from 10am to 7pm, specifically designed for professionals — even on Sundays, your peace of mind is our top priority.
sav3: Thanks to our Helpdesk service, our technicians can diagnose issues remotely via FaceTime, WhatsApp or phone call. If necessary, an on-site intervention is arranged as quickly as possible.
fundingContent: Finance your project by trusting our banking partners. We adapt to your needs.
fundingContent2: Equip yourself without budget constraints. Come and discover our tailor-made financing solutions.
fundingSubContent: Leasing & Renting tax deductible up to 120%!
pageCoinDesc: Discover and compare the different characteristics of our automated payment machine.
pageCoinDesc2: Choosing the right payment machine, also means choosing peace of mind.
pageControlDesc: Discover and compare the different characteristics of our payment terminals.
pageControlDesc2: Choosing the right payment terminal, also means choosing peace of mind.

comparatorAcceptVerify: Accepts and verifies all ticket types
contactText: We are here to answer all your requests.
packageIntro: By choosing Cashconcept payment machines, you benefit from a complete, turnkey service:
package1: directly in your establishment, for worry-free installation.
package2: carried out by our experts, guaranteeing optimal operation from the start.
package3: in use, so that you and your team are autonomous and efficient from day one.
seoProductDescCoin: Discover the automated payment machine {{product_name}} from CashConcept !
seoProductDescControl: Discover the control terminal {{product_name}} from CashConcept !
seoComparatorDesc: Come and compare CashBox payment solutions (automatic payment machine / control terminals) offered by CashConcept
seoSiteMapDesc: Access the CashConcept sitemap to discover our automatic payment machine, control terminals and solutions adapted to your professional needs.
seoHomePageDesc: CashConcept - Your specialist and leader in the marketing of CashBox automatic payment machine and order terminal from 4€/d
seoContactDesc: Contact CashConcept to discover our range of CashBox solutions (automatic payment machines / control terminals)
seoCoinChangerDesc: Discover the CashBox automatic payment machines.
seoFinancingDesc: Simulate the financing of your CashBox coin changer/automatic cash register using financial renting via CashConcept's banking partners.
financingDesc: Optimize your investment with our financing simulation tool dedicated to automatic Cashconcept cointers.
financingDesc2: 📄 A tool designed to speed up your financing
financingDesc3: Our simulator facilitates the transition of information between you and cashconcept, thus guaranteeing rapid management of your request and a simplified financing procedure.
financingDesc4: 🔍 Invest in all serenity and facilitate the management of your transactions!
financingMention: The information completed is exclusively transmitted to the members of the CashConcept team

trust.label: VNE Belgium by CashConcept
trust.title: A relationship of trust
trust.description1: With VNE Belgium by CashConcept, we place listening and customer satisfaction at the heart of every collaboration. Each installation of our CashBox automatic payment systems is tailored to our clients’ specific needs, with personalized support and constant field presence.
trust.description2: Our priority? To provide reliable, secure and perfectly adapted solutions, while remaining available and attentive at every stage.
trust.description3: Because a satisfied customer is our best showcase, we remain available and attentive before, during and after every trusted collaboration.

persoSubtitle: Security, design and colors tailor-made for your business.
persoIntro1: CashBox automatic coin changers are evolving and now becoming fully customizable in order to adapt perfectly to the visual identity of your business.
persoIntro2: Thanks to their modern design and their new customization options, CashBox solutions become a real element of enhancement of your cash register area.
persoAvailable: Available in the color of your choice
persoSectorsTitle: An ideal solution for all businesses
persoSectorsDesc: Whatever your activity, your coin mechanism integrates perfectly into your environment and reinforces the professional image of your brand.
persoWhyDesc: Customer experience and brand image play an essential role in the development of a business.
persoBenefitDesignD: A careful finish that matches the most demanding interiors.
persoBenefitColorD: Customization of colors according to your visual identity and your brand.
persoBenefitFitD: A harmonious set-up in your store, right down to the checkout furniture.
persoBenefitImageD: A checkout area that reinforces a professional and high-end perception.
persoBenefitSecureD: Reliable and secure cash management, without compromising on robustness.
persoBenefitTurnkeyD: CashConcept supports you from the choice of model to installation.
persoModernTitle: A modern solution for your point of sale
persoModernDesc: CashBox coin changers are no longer just cash management systems.
persoCtaDesc1: Choose the color that matches your brand and create a unique automatic coin changer, perfectly suited to your business.
persoCtaDesc2: CashConcept supports you in choosing your automatic cash management solution: a reliable, secure and entirely personalized system for your business.

chatbot.title: VNE Belgium Assistant
chatbot.teaserText: I'm your VNE Belgium by CashConcept virtual assistant. I'm here to help you find your ideal automated payment machine in under a minute. Click here to start
chatbot.welcome: Hello 👋 I can help you find the automated payment machine best suited to your business in under a minute.
chatbot.askEstablishment: Do you already have an establishment?
chatbot.askTypeExisting: What type of establishment do you have?
chatbot.askTypeNew: What type of establishment would you like to open?
chatbot.askAmount: Approximately what is the daily amount of your cash payments?
chatbot.recommendSingle: Based on your activity, here is the most suitable CashBox model 👇
chatbot.recommendPlural: Based on your activity, here are the most suitable CashBox models 👇
chatbot.askRenting:
Would you like to take advantage of our rental plan starting from only €4 per day?

This solution is interest-free, with no commitment, and tax-deductible up to 120%.
chatbot.coordsFormRenting: Perfect. To allow one of our advisors to get back to you, please complete your contact details. You can then send your request by email or via WhatsApp:
chatbot.coordsForm: No problem. If you would still like to receive more information about our solutions or be contacted at a later time, please complete your contact details. You can then send your request by email or via WhatsApp:
chatbot.formError: Please fill in all fields correctly.
chatbot.emailError: Oops, sending by e-mail failed. You can try again or use WhatsApp.
chatbot.finish:
Thank you, we have received your request. One of our sales advisors will contact you as soon as possible.

Best regards,
VNE Belgium by CashConcept
chatbot.recapIntro: Hello, here is my request via the VNE by CashConcept assistant:
